title.en: Thermal ablation of the post-EMR defect margin (STSC)

description.en: Application of snare-tip soft coagulation (STSC) circumferentially to the defect margin after piecemeal EMR to reduce adenoma recurrence, with safe technique avoiding deep mural injury.

criteria.en: Performs STSC inconsistently; coverage of margin incomplete.
Achieves complete circumferential STSC of every accessible margin; safe distance from muscularis; recognises and aborts when DMI is risked.
Teaches the technique; manages technically difficult margins; documents coverage.
